articles.title: LLAMA 3.1 AND 405B MODELS
articles.summary: Meta has released its first open frontier AI model along with training details. The model is on par with top closed models with a 128k context length, chat models, and a great open system.

articles.title: HARVEY RAISES $100M SERIES C
articles.summary: The legal startup, now a unicorn, has raised from Google ventures and others to continue its push into big law firms.

articles.title: OPEN SOURCE IS THE PATH FORWARD
articles.summary: Mark Zuckerberg outlined why open source is key to Meta's strategy and how Meta plans to support this work.

articles.title: IMPROVED TEST-TIME ADAPTATION
articles.summary: STAble Memory rePlay (STAMP) is a method that addresses distribution shifts between training and test data using only unlabeled test data. Unlike existing methods, STAMP excels in both recognizing known classes and rejecting outliers during inference.

articles.title: VIDEO POINT TRACKING
articles.summary: LocoTrack is an advanced model for tracking any point across video sequences. It uses local 4D correlation and bidirectional correspondence for precise tracking. LocoTrack operates nearly six times faster than current leading models.

articles.title: STAR OPERATION TO TRAIN NEURAL NETWORKS
articles.summary: The star operation is a method that enriches AI models by projecting data into complex, high-dimensional spaces without the need for bulky architectures.

articles.title: [GITHUB REPO] DATACHAIN: UNSTRUCTURED DATA MANAGEMENT FOR AI PROJECTS, REIMAGINED
articles.summary: Iterative's new open-source tool lets you simplify AI projects and scale unstructured data management. With DataChain, you can source, curate, and version cloud data at scale [10]; easily integrate metadata from various formats; parallelize local and API-based AI model inferences for 3x-10x speedup [10]; and store AI model outputs

articles.title: as Python data objects. Star the repo
LLAMA AGENT STACK
articles.summary: Meta has released an example system for using its Llama models as agents to perform a variety of tasks.

articles.title: TEXT-DRIVEN STYLIZATION WITH DIFFUSION MODELS
articles.summary: Artist is a training-free method that controls content and style generation in pretrained diffusion models for text-driven stylization.

articles.title: OPEN-WORLD EXPLORATION IN MINECRAFT
articles.summary: Odyssey is a new framework that equips large language model-based agents with advanced skills for exploring Minecraft.

articles.title: GUMLOOP SEED ROUND
articles.summary: Gumloop raised a $3.1M Seed round led by First Round Capital with participation from YC and co-founders at Instacart, Dropbox, and Airtable. Gumloop is a no-code AI automation platform that lets any employee within a business build their own AI tooling and have as much impact as an engineer.

articles.title: AI DEVELOPMENT KITS: TENSTORRENT UPDATE
articles.summary: Tenstorrent has launched affordable AI development hardware, including the Wormhole n150 and n300 PCIe cards, priced at $999 and $1,399, as well as developer workstations, the air-cooled TT-LoudBox for $12,000 and water-cooled TT-QuietBox for $15,000, both designed to aid AI development with a focus on connectivity and scaled-out performance.

articles.title: AI PREDICTS DROUGHTS A YEAR IN ADVANCE
articles.summary: Skoltech and Sber researchers have developed AI models that can predict droughts several months to a year in advance, improving risk management for agriculture, insurance, and finance sectors. The models, tested across various climates, utilize spatiotemporal neural networks and publicly available data. Russia's largest bank plans to integrate these findings into its risk assessment systems.

articles.title: MAKE SAP PART OF YOUR REAL-TIME DATA STRATEGY
articles.summary: Customers expect intelligent experiences in real time. Learn how to make that possible with SAP Datasphere and cloud-native Apache Kafka.

articles.title: WHAT DOES MONEY LOOK LIKE IN AN AI UTOPIA?
articles.summary: It's unclear what role money will play in a future AI utopia.

articles.title: SAMSUNG IS POURING RESEARCH INTO “AI PHONES”
THIS IS HOW MUCH DATA DOES AI CREATES EVERY MINUTE
articles.summary: Every sixty seconds, nearly $300K is spent on AI, 52 college papers are plagiarized using AI, and nearly 20K images are created using text-to-image algorithms.
